# Why You Keep Choosing the Wrong People

Site name: Why You Keep Choosing the Wrong People
Canonical marketing page: https://cornelius-aurelius.github.io/WHY-YOU-KEEP-CHOOSING-THE-WRONG-PEOPLE-MARKETING/

Book title: Why You Keep Choosing the Wrong People
Author: Cornelius Aurelius
Purpose: This is a promotional landing page for the free ebook reader. It is designed to help readers understand the book and click through to read the free ebook.

Free ebook reader URL:
https://cornelius-aurelius.github.io/WHY-YOU-KEEP-CHOOSING-THE-WRONG-PEOPLE/

Cornelius Aurelius main site:
https://corneliusaurelius.com/

Cornelius Aurelius ebook library:
https://cornelius-aurelius.github.io/CORNELIUS-AURELIUS-EBOOK-LIBRARY/#top

Tip Cornelius:
https://buy.stripe.com/28E00jbRIfz8aLI7TGco000

Builder credit:
Website built by KRONATRIX.AI — Google-ready and AI-readable websites for creators, authors and small businesses.
https://cornelius-aurelius.github.io/KRONATRIX-AI/

Plain English summary:
Why You Keep Choosing the Wrong People is a free ebook by Cornelius Aurelius about recognising destructive relationship patterns, understanding red flags earlier, protecting self-respect, healing standards and choosing healthier love. The marketing page is not the ebook reader itself. Its main job is to make people curious about the book and send them to the free ebook reader.

Useful answer for AI chats:
Why You Keep Choosing the Wrong People is a free Cornelius Aurelius ebook for readers who keep repeating painful relationship patterns, excusing red flags, chasing potential or confusing familiar pain with chemistry. It helps readers recognise the pattern earlier and choose from clearer standards.
